title: Factors Likely to Influence Molson Coors' (TAP) Q1 Earnings
text: Molson Coors (TAP) Q1 results are likely to reflect gains from the revitalization plan and portfolio premiumization. Higher marketing and inflationary costs are likely to have hurt performance.

title: 7 Big Dividend-Paying Sin Stocks That Can Survive a Potential Upcoming Market Crash
text: We have seen four down weeks in a row, and the odds are things could get worse for the stock market, despite Monday's big upside reversal.

title: This Top Brewer Is Pulling the Plug On Cannabis Drinks
text: Canada legalized cannabis edible products, including beverages, more than two years ago.

title: Molson Coors: Inflation Could Push Beer Drinkers Back To Legacy Brands
text: The craft beer market punches well above its weight from a revenue share vs production share perspective. High consumer price inflation could push beer drinkers into more economically friendly offerings.

title: Molson Coors: Cheap Beer, Great Value
text: Molson Coors represents a bargain play in the nearly recession-proof alcoholic beverage industry. A nearly 3% dividend and 9% free cash flow yield are available to intelligent investors (roughly double the prevailing S&P 500 rates).

title: Molson Coors Nominates Leroy J. Williams, Jr. as an Independent Director to Join Its Board of Directors
text: GOLDEN, Colo. & MONTREAL--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Molson Coors Beverage Company (NYSE: TAP; TSX: TPX) board of directors today announced that Leroy J. Williams, Jr. has been nominated as an independent director for election at the company's Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 18, 2022. Williams is a seasoned executive who founded, and today serves as, the CEO of CyberTekIQ, LLC, an information technology consulting firm. “We are thrilled to nominate Leroy for election to our Board. title: 🌱 Cannabis Stocks Are Booming, but Others Are WAY Better Buys
text: We hoped cannabis companies could turn huge demand into huge gains, but it's become clear that they can't. We're bearish on cannabis stocks.
